'''Garrolkah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served under [[Sebolto]]'s employ. He was also a member of the [[Bazurkah Clan]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Like all members of the clan, he was wanted dead by [[Bog'Ruhx]] for supposed slander. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] while he was on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] meeting [[Sebolto]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
